title: 10 best herbal teas for one side headache
description: Achillea millefolium, also known as yarrow, teas helps with one side headache because of its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The active compounds in yarrow, such as flavonoids and terpenoids, work to relax tense muscles and reduce blood vessel constriction that can contribute to migraines. By calming the nervous system and promoting blood flow, yarrow tea may help alleviate one-sided headaches, also known as migraines, and provide relief from the associated pain and dis...
